itinerary.title: Educational Punjab
itinerary.tagline: Amritsar • Wagah Border • Jallianwala Bagh • Partition Museum
itinerary.overview:
EDUCATIONAL PUNJAB • HERITAGE, VALOR & CULTURAL DISCOVERY

Welcome to an enlightening academic journey curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Empower your students with the absolute Best Punjab Tour Package, specially engineered to merge historic wisdom, structural design, and deep patriotic pride. As your highly trusted travel consultants, TRAGUIN transforms an ordinary school field trip into a premium luxury holiday experience for faculty and an unforgettable educational encounter for students. From the serene spiritual geometry of the Golden Temple to the deeply emotional historic narrative of Jallianwala Bagh, this curated itinerary delivers premium stays and immersive experiences that live in young minds forever.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This custom educational field layout presents a perfect synergy between patriotic historical learning, cultural immersion, and student safety parameters. Travelling in premium, mechanically verified AC luxury coaches driven by expert long-haul drivers, the safety of your students is our utmost priority. Featuring a complete all-meals plan (APAI) with freshly prepared, hygienic buffet menus designed for youth wellness, this route covers the core historic landmarks of Amritsar. This program includes specialized TRAGUIN curated experiences like interactively guided historic tours, museum audio-guides, and specialized security personnel.

WHY CHOOSE THE BEST PUNJAB TOUR PACKAGE FOR STUDENTS?
When planning an academic or Luxury Punjab Holiday, educators require safe logistics, comfortable accommodation, and profound knowledge values. Amritsar serves as an ideal living classroom, offering top tourist places in Punjab that tell tales of profound resilience and independence. A Punjab Family Tour or educational student package here provides a massive look into India's historical evolution. Students can capture famous attractions and popular Instagram locations such as the spectacular evening beating retreat ceremony at the Wagah Border and the beautifully designed heritage corridors. This tour is packed with immersive cultural learning, from traditional shopping walks to observing community kitchen operations at the world's largest free kitchen (Langar). With our signature TRAGUIN Punjab Packages, you receive premium handpicked hotels, strict safety guidelines, and dedicated assistance, making this the ideal time to visit Punjab for educational growth.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days Punjab package (PB-007 / TRG-PUN-007): Amritsar • Wagah Border • Jallianwala Bagh • Partition Museum with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR & EVENING GOLDEN TEMPLE WALK — WELCOME TO THE HOLY CITY – ARCHITECTURAL MARVEL & INFINITE PEACE
Day 02: JALLIANWALA BAGH, PARTITION MUSEUM & WAGAH BORDER — PATRIOTIC FERVOUR, INDEPENDENCE HISTORY & VALOR HISTORY
Day 03: GOBINDGARH FORT & CITADEL HISTORY EXPLORATION — MILITARY STRATEGY, FORTS & PUNJABI WARRIOR HERITAGE
Day 04: DEPARTURE FROM AMRITSAR — CHERISHING VALUABLE LESSONS & UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private interaction session for students with certified historians regarding the Partition files.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Smoothly timed travel schedules to ensure zero exhaustion and optimal learning outcomes.
Personalized Assistance: Dedicated group handlers coordinating with school faculty at every step.
Luxury Transportation: Speed-governed premium coaches complying with strict institutional road-safety norms.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR & EVENING GOLDEN TEMPLE WALK — WELCOME TO THE HOLY CITY – ARCHITECTURAL MARVEL & INFINITE PEACE
days.description: Your premium Punjab educational experience begins with a grand welcome at Amritsar Railway Station/Airport by our dedicated logistics representatives. Board your private luxury transport coaches and transfer to your premium handpicked hotels. After a briefing session and refreshing break, visit the iconic Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple). Students will explore its unique architectural structure, four-door layout representing equality, and experience the unparalleled scenic beauty and serenity of the holy pool.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Golden Temple complex, Heritage Plaza Walk, Architectural study.
Evening Experience: Witnessing the serene Palki Sahib night ceremony and community kitchen kitchen tour.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium Student-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome Drink, Refreshing Evening Snack & Buffet Dinner

days.title: JALLIANWALA BAGH, PARTITION MUSEUM & WAGAH BORDER — PATRIOTIC FERVOUR, INDEPENDENCE HISTORY & VALOR HISTORY
days.description: Following a healthy, comprehensive buffet breakfast, head to Jallianwala Bagh, a highly significant landmark for Punjab sightseeing. Students will witness the bullet marks, the martyr's well, and learn emotional storytelling about India's struggle for independence. Next, visit the world's first Partition Museum for a deep historical look into first-hand letters and items. In the afternoon, drive via scenic routes to the Wagah Border to experience the electrifying, high-spirited Beating Retreat Ceremony.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jallianwala Bagh Memorial, Partition Museum, Indo-Pak Wagah Border Arena.
Optional Activities: Interactive historical quiz session with prizes for students during the transit coach ride.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium Student-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast, Nutritious Lunch & Special Theme Dinner

days.title: GOBINDGARH FORT & CITADEL HISTORY EXPLORATION — MILITARY STRATEGY, FORTS & PUNJABI WARRIOR HERITAGE
days.description: Dive into military history and traditional structural defense at the magnificent Gobindgarh Fort, one of the most historical attractions in the region. Students will explore the ancient ramparts, traditional weapon displays, and see the Toshakhana which once housed the Koh-i-Noor diamond. Watch an immersive 7D historical movie showcasing the epic rise of Maharaja Ranjit Singh. Spend the evening enjoying cultural folk dance performances (Bhangra/Gidda) organized within the fort parameters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gobindgarh Fort Complex, Weapon Museums, 7D Historic Theatre Show.
Evening Experience: Exclusive Punjabi cultural folk night and student interactive talent session.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium Student-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast, Mid-Day Lunch & Farewell DJ Gala Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE FROM AMRITSAR — CHERISHING VALUABLE LESSONS & UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
days.description: Savor a hearty breakfast at your hotel before wrapping up your educational journey. Check out and board your luxury transportation coaches. Stop briefly for final souvenir shopping at the local markets to take home authentic Punjabi crafts. Transfer back to Amritsar Airport or the Railway Station for your onward journey, bringing back rich historical insights and unforgettable memories curated by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury group coach railway/airport drops.
Meals Included: Sumptuous Buffet Breakfast & Packed Travel Snacks
